subcodes.first_line: The Most Exalted Pen hath been grieved by those who have committed that which was forbidden them in the Book. We have forbidden all from [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد تکدر قلمی الاعلی من الذین ارتکبوا ما نهوا عنه فی الکتاب انا نهینا الکل عن
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @consolation and comfort, @praise and encouragement, @obedience to; authority of the Manifestations of God
